title: Jerboa
description: Mod extends the standard minecraft game by adding new recipes, as well as changing standard ones, adding armor and tools
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Damx9UAD/images/bad3ea495cb1f6da8af358781482a1a90bf38d35.png 'Title')

---

## Mod is the successor to [The Age of Being](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-age-of-being)

I saw this modifier and decided to continue its development. Mod was renamed, and also from the randomized digits in the version of the modification I moved to the best system. Who is interested in the very bottom of the description will be the way to decipher the version.

## Short introduction

Jerboa is a modification that expands and improves the traditional game, making it more logical and interesting. The modification is in active development.

## Brief description of the mod

- Adding crafting of some items without crafting (in the likeness of a saddle, threads)

- Tools for craft

- Changing existing crafts
  
## Available languages

- Russian
- English
